name: Mushroom Florentine Casserole
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces frozen chopped spinach, thawed and well drained
1 can condensed cream of mushroom soup (10 3/4 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Mix spinach, soup, and Worcestershire sauce in an ungreased 9-inch pie plate.
3. Arrange mushrooms on top of the mixture.
4. Sprinkle Savory Crunch evenly over the mushrooms.
5. Bake uncovered until hot and bubbly, about 20 minutes.
6. Serve with lemon wedges.
Makes 5 or 6 servings.
